subcodes.first_line: O Hasan! Hearken unto the Call of Husayn Who hath been incarcerated in the Prison Fortress of ’Akká by reason of that which the hands of the heedless have wrought.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حسن اسمع ندآء الحسین عن شطر هذا السجن العظیم تالله قد ورد علیه ما
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @station of the Manifestation of God, @call to action
